schema: paper7 DES J0408 legacy runtime compatibility audit v1
purpose: Record whether the modern helper runtime matches the public DES notebook runtime evidence relevant to row-level time-delay reproduction.

source.notebook_file: data/external/source_candidate_repos/DESJ0408_time_delay_cosmography/notebooks/Distance posterior from combining lensing, kinematics, and external convergence.ipynb

claim_boundary: This audit identifies a plausible compatibility source; it does not prove the mismatch is caused by lenstronomy version drift.
No old environment is installed and no failed model is promoted.
No T2 posterior, Bayes factor, or operator-necessity claim is introduced.
next_finite_action: Attempt a separate, isolated lenstronomy 0.9.2 compatibility probe only if dependency resolution is feasible; otherwise keep the strict two-model core.
